summary: Comprehensive testing of ChronoWeave multi-track timeline feature completed. Core multi-track functionality working excellently - 3 tracks display vertically with different colors, cross-track events span all tracks, local calendar systems working. Minor issues with timeline switching and track axis click interactions.

interaction_bugs.issue: Timeline switching between Ages of Eldoria and Galactic Chronicles has interaction timeouts - dropdown may close unexpectedly
Clicking on track axis to add events doesn't consistently trigger Add Event form - may need better click area definition

passed_tests: Multi-track display: 3 tracks (Aeloran Empire, Thalassian Dominion, Sylvari Confederation) render stacked vertically with distinct colors (gold, blue, green)
Local calendar abbreviations correctly displayed: IR (Imperial Reckoning), TC (Thalassian Count), ME (Moonrise Era)
Cross-track events render as red vertical lines/bands spanning all 3 tracks (4 cross-track events found)
Cross-track event cards show equivalent years in all track calendars when clicked
Add Track button opens modal with complete form (name, calendar, abbreviation, color picker, epoch, range fields)
Color picker functional with 8 color options in Add Track form
Theme switcher works correctly (Fantasy/Sci-Fi modes with visual theme changes)
Zoom controls functional (zoom in, zoom out, reset buttons responsive)
Export JSON button present and accessible
Event markers clickable (7 event markers found) - event cards open properly
Period events display as horizontal bars on tracks (4 period bars found) - cards open when clicked
Drag scrolling works without triggering add event functionality
Year markers display correctly with local calendar abbreviations on each track
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix timeline picker dropdown interaction - ensure smooth switching between Ages of Eldoria and Galactic Chronicles. Investigate track axis click handler - improve click area responsiveness for Add Event form trigger. Both are medium priority UX improvements.

success_percentage.frontend: 90% - Multi-track core functionality excellent, minor interaction issues with timeline switching and axis clicks
